title: Safe House Expands Capacity to Support More Girls
summary: UCDP's Safe House for street girls has expanded its capacity, allowing more vulnerable girls to access shelter and rehabilitation.
content:
UCDP's Safe House for street girls has expanded its capacity, allowing more vulnerable girls to access safe shelter, education, and rehabilitation support.

## What the Safe House Does

The Safe House provides a safe home for girls rescued from the streets. Residents receive meals, clothing, counselling, school support, and life skills training as part of a structured rehabilitation programme.

The goal is to reintegrate girls back into their families or communities wherever possible, or support them in independent living.

*Update this article with details of the expansion and impact stories.*
